info.title: Fraudox OSINT API
info.description: Enterprise-grade fraud detection and OSINT scoring engine. Analyzes given Email and IP addresses simultaneously across 5 distinct modules: Typo-squatting, DNS Configuration, Social Footprint (Gravatar), Port Scanning (VPN/Proxy detection), and Disposable Email databases. Returns a precise risk score from 0-100 with actionable verdicts.

post.description: Calculates the total risk score and verdict based on parallel OSINT module scans.

email.description: Target email address for typo-squatting, DNS, social footprint, and disposable checks.

ip.description: Target IP address for open port scanning (VPN, Proxy, Tor nodes).

403.description: Forbidden - Missing or invalid RapidAPI proxy secret

429.description: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded
